holdings.infoBox: SRHQ is an equity ETF with a total of 81 individual holdings. The top holdings are Humana stock at 2.48%, Sterling Infrastructure at 2.45%, Centene at 2.20%, Commvault Systems at 1.94%, and UnitedHealth Group at 1.76%.

overview.description: The SRH U.S. Quality GARP ETF (SRHQ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the SRH U.S. Quality GARP index. The fund tracks an equally weighted index of US large-cap stocks screened based on three fundamental factors: value, growth, and quality. SRHQ was launched on Oct 4, 2022 and is issued by SRH.
